name: Plundered Power Patron Plane - Vidolia
effectText: You can reveal 1 "Power Patron" monster in your Extra Deck; banish (face-down) 1 card from your hand, then add to your hand or Special Summon, 1 monster from your Deck that mentions that revealed monster's name (except in its once-per-turn restriction clause). You can only use this effect of "Plundered Power Patron Plane - Vidolia" once per turn. Monsters your opponent controls lose 100 ATK for each banished card. Your opponent cannot activate the effects of cards in the GY, while you control "Nerva the Power Patron of Creation", "Jupiter the Power Patron of Destruction", and "Junora the Power Patron of Tuning".
